scope.description: Consolidates deuterocanon NRSV status after DEUTERO-01 and DEUTERO-02 work.

nrsvNotApplicableRows.reason: DRB-only versification/source-shape row; NRSV Bel and the Dragon begins at active Daniel 14:1.

determination.summary: This audit separates NRSV-applicable gaps from governed source-shape or versification exceptions. It does not globally promote deuterocanon trust.
